## Problem Statement

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve.

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## Use Case

Describe the use case for this feature in the context of energy management or DER integration.

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or references.
